Footer.description: Powerful API services for developers and businesses. Build faster with our reliable infrastructure.

Hero.title: Build Faster with
Hero.subtitle: Access enterprise-grade API services with simple pricing. From data processing to AI integrations, we've got you covered.

Features.title: Built for Scale, Designed for
Features.subtitle: Everything you need to integrate powerful APIs into your applications, with enterprise-grade reliability.
Features.lightning_fast_desc: Average response time under 50ms with our globally distributed infrastructure.
Features.enterprise_security_desc: SOC 2 compliant with end-to-end encryption and advanced threat protection.
Features.global_cdn_desc: Edge servers in 50+ locations ensure minimal latency worldwide.
Features.realtime_analytics_desc: Monitor usage, track performance, and optimize your API consumption.
Features.developer_first_desc: Comprehensive SDKs, detailed docs, and code examples in every language.
Features.support_24_7_desc: AI-powered chatbot plus dedicated support engineers ready to help.
Features.ai_integration_desc: Smart recommendations and natural language queries for your data.
Features.rate_limiting_desc: Flexible rate limits with burst allowances and automatic scaling.

CTA.subtitle: Join thousands of developers using our APIs to power their applications. Get started for free, no credit card required.

data_processing.name: Data Processing API
data_processing.description: High-performance data transformation and processing pipeline for structured and unstructured data.

ai_vision.name: AI Vision API
ai_vision.description: Advanced image recognition, object detection, and visual content analysis powered by machine learning.

geolocation.name: Geolocation API
geolocation.description: Accurate IP geolocation, address validation, and distance calculation services.

authentication.name: Authentication API
authentication.description: Secure user authentication, SSO, and identity verification for your applications.

natural_language.name: Natural Language API
natural_language.description: Text analysis, sentiment detection, entity extraction, and language translation services.

realtime_events.name: Real-time Events API
realtime_events.description: WebSocket-based real-time event streaming and pub/sub messaging infrastructure.

SupportPage.title: How Can We
SupportPage.subtitle: Chat with our AI assistant or browse our resources for instant answers.

quick_actions.recommend_api: Recommend an API for my use case
quick_actions.calls_left: How many calls do I have left?

generate_key.question: How do I generate a new API key?
generate_key.answer: Go to Dashboard > API Keys > Click "New Key". You can name your key and set permissions.

rate_limit.question: What happens if I exceed my rate limit?
rate_limit.answer: Requests exceeding your rate limit will receive a 429 response. Consider upgrading your plan for higher limits.

change_plan.question: How do I change my subscription plan?
change_plan.answer: Navigate to Dashboard > Billing > Change Plan. Changes take effect at your next billing cycle.

free_trial.question: Is there a free trial available?
free_trial.answer: Yes! All our APIs include a free tier with limited calls per month. No credit card required.

need_help.title: Need More Help?
need_help.description: Reach out to our support team

ai_responses.welcome: Hello! I'm your AI support assistant. I can help you with API recommendations, troubleshooting, and answer questions about your usage. How can I assist you today?
ai_responses.recommend: Based on your question, I'd recommend our **AI Vision API** for image processing tasks, or our **Data Processing API** for data transformation needs. What specific use case are you working on?
ai_responses.calls: You currently have **15,000 API calls** remaining this month across all your subscriptions. Your quota resets on the 1st of each month.
ai_responses.rate_limit:
Rate limiting protects our infrastructure. Your current limits are:
- **Free tier**: 10 requests/second
- **Pro tier**: 100 requests/second

Consider implementing exponential backoff in your code.
ai_responses.default: I understand you're asking about {query}. Let me connect you with more specific information. Could you provide more details about what you're trying to accomplish?

OverviewPage.title: Dashboard
OverviewPage.description: Welcome back! Here's your API overview.
